metric_layout: eval0_metric.npy / eval1_metric.npy: flat f64, the per-iteration eval_metric on validation_0 / validation_1 respectively (n_iterations_run entries each).
metric_note: eval_metric defaults to the objective and is set EXPLICITLY here. RMSE == sqrt(sum_w (pred-target)^2 / sum_w); Logloss == weighted cross-entropy over p=sigmoid(raw logit). Two eval sets exercise per-eval-set per-iteration logging (TRAIN-07).
